arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling drops early Arsenal team news hint amid Mikel Arteta's Martin Odegaard issue
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling has dropped a team news hint ahead of Arsenal's clash against Manchester United . With that being said, Arteta will be hoping Odegaard, with help from Sterling and Jorginho, can lead Arsenal to victory.

arts.ttl: Five of the best cup clashes between Arsenal and Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal host Manchester United in the FA Cup’s third round today, a fixture steeped in history and rivalry. The two most successful sides in the competition’s history collide at the Emirates, in an early round encounter between two of English football’s giants. Ahead of their meeting in North London, we’ve looked back on some memorable […] The post Five of the best cup clashes between Arsenal and Man United first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Joe Cole tips Arsenal transfer target to join another Premier League club instead
arts.sum: Former West Ham star Joe Cole has discussed the transfer saga surrounding Brighton striker Evan Ferguson, who has been linked with a number of clubs in recent times. CaughtOffside have previously reported on Ferguson being looked at by West Ham, Arsenal and others, and it now seems Cole is optimistic he could be convinced to […] The post Joe Cole tips Arsenal transfer target to join another Premier League club instead appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal are wearing a special white kit vs Manchester United
arts.sum: Against Nottingham Forest, Oxford United and Liverpool white has been the colour of choice, and it actually comes down to the 'No More Red' campaign - an initiative launched in 2022 working alongside Arsenal in the Community to help raise awareness of and tackle knife crime. 2025's announcement of the white kit returning read: "adidas and Arsenal are proud to announce the fourth year of No More Red, a joint initiative first launched in 2022 to support and build on 40 years of Arsenal in the Community’s work to help keep young people safe from knife crime and youth violence.
